notes: Primary individual; subtyped as members:DailConstituency or members:SeanadPanel based on representType field
Used directly as the IRI of the :DailConstituency or :SeanadPanel individual
Display label on the constituency/panel individual e.g. 'Dublin Mid-West'; 'Agricultural Panel'
xsd:string; short API code on the Constituencies individual e.g. 'Dublin-Mid-West'; 'Agricultural-Panel'; also the slug in the individual IRI
'constituency' → members:DailConstituency; 'panel' → members:SeanadPanel; expressed via OWL class typing not a string property; the two subclasses are owl:disjointWith each other
Associated HouseTerm individual; subtyped as agents:DailTerm or agents:SeanadTerm based on houseCode
Domain: members:Constituencies; Range: agents:HouseTerm; links the constituency/panel to the specific numbered term for which it is defined; rdfs:subPropertyOf members:inHouseTerm
Used as the IRI of the HouseTerm individual; also the object value of members:constituencyInHouseTerm on the constituencyOrPanel individual
xsd:integer; ordinal number of the term on the HouseTerm individual e.g. 9; 34; also encoded in the HouseTerm IRI path
xsd:string; short house code on the HouseTerm individual e.g. 'dail'; 'seanad'
'dail' → agents:DailTerm; 'seanad' → agents:SeanadTerm; expressed via OWL class typing not a string property; derivable from HouseTerm IRI path
Display label on the HouseTerm individual e.g. '9th Dáil'; '34th Dáil'
